title: ExtrimeTreasure
description: Customizable treasures, from any blocks and with any objects
body:
![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e988798942f002f3d1decbb5c769fdcfc12738_0.webp)

Customizable treasures, from any blocks and with any objects.

**These are chests that can be obtained by digging a certain block.**

### Support and Feedback 💬
If you have questions, suggestions, or have found a bug, please contact me:
[Discord](https://discord.gg/yf23xT9Z8j)

### Possibilities:

- Unlimited number of types and types of rewards for chests
- Setting the minimum and maximum number of items
- Setting the chances of finding items in chests
- Choice of block to break to get treasures
- Notifying the player with sound and message
- Selecting the world in which the plugin will work


### Commands/Permissions:

- /et reload - _extrime.treasure.reload_
- /et help - _extrime.treasure.stop_

_Sponsors - Empty🥺_
